zh.lifeSummary: 當Hermann II von Rüdenberg und von Stromberg於大約1158年出生時，他的父親Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg35歲，母親Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Stromberg32歲。他於大約1179年與(Mädchen)結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1246年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hermann II von Rüdenberg und von Stromberg于大约1158年出生时，他的父亲Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg35岁，母亲Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Stromberg32岁。他于大约1179年与(Mädchen)结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1246年之后。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Rüdenberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Kurt, Wolfgang.
German: habitational name from any of various places called Rodenberg in Hesse, North Rhine-Westphalia, and Lower Saxony, from elements meaning ‘red mountain’.
Dutch: variant of   Rodenburg  .

variants.name: Roddenberry
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch and German   Rodenberg  .

variants.name: Rodenburg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin.
Dutch: habitational name from a place so named in South Holland.
German: variant of   Rodenberg  .

variants.name: Rodenberger
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of various places called   Rodenberg  .

nameMeanings.name: und
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Myer.

Jewish (Ashkenazic): from German Pfund ‘pound’, either a nickname or one of the names chosen at random from vocabulary words in the 18th and 19th centuries by government officials at the time when surnames became compulsory.
Altered form of German   Pfund  .

variants.name: Pfund
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Claus, Erwin, Gerhard.

German: metonymic occupational name for a sealer of weights, or for a wholesale merchant, from Middle High German pfunt ‘pound’ (as a measure of weight and a unit of currency), or a nickname relating to a tax obligation.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Stromberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lennart, Arndt, Gunn, Knute, Lisen, Maija, Mats, Nels, Olle, Thor.
German: habitational name from any of various places sonamed, in Westphalia, Rhineland, and Hesse.
Swedish(Strömberg): ornamental name composed of the elementsström ‘river’ + berg ‘mountain, hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Hermann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from heri ‘army’ + man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Hermann II von Rüdenberg und von Stromberg was born about 1158, his father, Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg, was 35 and his mother, Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Stromberg, was 32. He married (Mädchen) about 1179. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died after 1246.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hermann II von Rüdenberg und von Stromberg est né environ 1158, son père, Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Stromberg, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé (Mädchen) environ 1179. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1246.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hermann II von Rüdenberg und von Stromberg um 1158 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg 35 und seine Mutter Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Stromberg 32. Er hat um 1179 (Mädchen) geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1246.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hermann II von Rüdenberg und von Stromberg è nato il circa 1158, il suo padre, Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Stromberg, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato (Mädchen) circa 1179. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1246.

ja.lifeSummary: Hermann II von Rüdenberg und von Strombergが約1158年に生まれた時，父Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Strombergは35歳，母Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Strombergは32歳であった。約1179年に(Mädchen)と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1246年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hermann II von Rüdenberg und von Stromberg(이)가 대략 1158년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Stromberg(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1179년 (Mädchen)(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1246년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hermann II von Rüdenberg und von Stromberg nasceu aproximadamente 1158, seu pai, Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Stromberg, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com (Mädchen) aproximadamente 1179. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1246.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hermann II von Rüdenberg und von Stromberg родился около 1158 г., его отцу по имени Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Stromberg, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени (Mädchen) около 1179 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер после 1246 г.

sm.UM 1158–NACH 1246: e tusa o le 1158–ina ua ma'ea le 1246

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hermann II von Rüdenberg und von Stromberg nació aproximadamente 1158, su papá, Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Stromberg, tenía 32 años. Se casó con (Mädchen) aproximadamente 1179. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió después de 1246.
